strengths: 20-year polyglot engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, demonstrating sustained technical depth
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production by Green Map globally
Active knowledge-sharer via workshops, conference talks (FOSS4G 2019), and open-source tooling — relevant to the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: AI expertise is effectively two months old (re:cinq, April 2025); no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale prior to the current role
No evidence of Director-level scope: no team leadership, strategic customer advisory, or cross-org technical strategy work visible anywhere in the résumé
Cloud experience is shallow — only AWS CDK cited at Optilyz; no evidence of cloud architecture, platform ownership, or deep ML/AI infrastructure
response.justification: The role requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI-powered products at Director-level scope. Bogdan's AI exposure is limited to roughly two months at re:cinq (MCP tooling and agentic frameworks), with no prior AI or ML work surfaced across a 20-year career. The résumé shows strong full-stack and systems engineering breadth and genuine entrepreneurial instinct (GISCollective), but zero evidence of the strategic customer advisory, cross-organizational technical leadership, or scaled AI product ownership the role demands. The engineering tenure (approximately 17 years of substantive work) meets the minimum bar, but the two critical differentiating competencies — AI depth and Director-level strategic scope — are both absent, making the candidate a poor fit at this seniority level.
